title: PageCall
description: A page call records a page view on a website.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user in your database.

anonymousId.description: A pseudo-unique substitute for a user ID.

properties.description: Free-form dictionary of properties of the page.

path.description: The path portion of the page URL.

search.description: The search query string of the URL.

url.description: The full URL of the page.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date string when the message was originally sent.

messageId.description: Unique identifier for the message to deduplicate.
